executives.name: Richard Cherry
executives.background: Mr. Cherry is a veteran executive in the nuclear industry, having served as President and CEO of Cotter Corporation and as a Vice President of General Atomics.

executives.name: Wayne Heili
executives.background: Mr. Heili has spent over 30 years in the uranium mining industry. He previously served as President and CEO of Ur-Energy Inc. and held various operations and engineering roles at the Smith Ranch-Highland ISR uranium project.

executives.name: William Sheriff
executives.background: Mr. Sheriff is the Executive Chairman of the Company. He has over 30 years of experience in the minerals industry and was a co-founder of Energy Metals Corp. and served as its Chairman and CEO.
